title: Distinguishable Armor Trims
description: Adds unique sprites for each armor trim type and material when displayed as an item
body:
### This resource pack adds unique sprites for every single armor trim on armor viewed as an item, thanks to 1.21.5's item predicates features!
# 
One draw back is that you can't change the trim material colors with a resource pack and have all the item's change color aswell, as each trim design in _each color_ are all **seperate files** (silence on chestplate with diamond material, silence on chestplate with redstone material, etc.); if you want the item sprite to change too, will, for now, have to change **every single trim sprite for the material you want to change the color of**...
# 
This resource pack should be usable in any version 1.21.5 and above, as long as they don't change anything significant about item predicates.
